def negative_public_api_surface_defined_only_by_import_side_effects():
    rule_id = "public_api_surface_defined_only_by_import_side_effects"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag packages whose public surface is created indirectly by import order."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
